---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for SUNSET16
title: "[FEATURE}"
labels: design
assignees: ''

---

> **Before opening a feature request, we strongly recommend posting in the [Discussions tab](../../discussions) first.**
> This allows the community to weigh in, helps us gauge interest, and keeps ideas visible to everyone.
> Open a feature request issue only if you have already discussed the idea and want to formally submit it for team review.

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem or gap is.
> e.g. I always feel like [...] when [...]

## Describe the feature you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've already thought about.

## Is this a modification to something existing, or something entirely new?
- [ ] Modification to an existing mechanic, scene, or system
- [ ] Something entirely new

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, references, or inspiration that might help us understand your vision.

---

## What happens if your idea is accepted?

All feature requests are reviewed at the team's discretion — submission does not guarantee implementation.

If your idea is accepted:
- By submitting this request, you grant SuperNova Studios permission to incorporate your idea into SUNSET16 or future projects.
- You retain no ownership or rights over the game or its assets.
- You will be credited appropriately in your preferred format (choose up to 2):
  - [ ] itch.io page
  - [ ] In-game credits
  - [ ] README on this repository

**Accepted contributors will be honoured as:**
> *Recognized by DOLOS — File: [Your Name or Preferred Alias]*

---

## Want to discuss further?

If you believe your idea is particularly strong or entirely novel and you'd prefer a more private conversation, reach out through one of these channels:
- Continue the conversation in the **Discussions tab** or via comments on this issue
- If you personally know a member of the SuperNova Studios team, feel free to reach out to them directly through your existing channel — they can escalate internally

We may reach out to you via Discord or an online meeting if we feel the idea warrants a closer conversation.
